name: golang-github-binject-go-donut
title: golang-github-binject-go-donut
description:
Donut Injector in Go
This package contains the Donut Injector ported to pure Go.
This package provides the binary file go-donut generated by
github-binject-go-donut.

arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for go-donut.
arguments.raw: -donut  Option present in package usage line for go-donut.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use go-donut because Donut Injector in Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use go-donut as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `go-donut [options] [args]` as documented upstream for go-donut.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair go-donut with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `go-donut --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

arguments.name: -donut
arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for go-donut.
